headline: Is Ross Stores, Inc. (ROST) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is ROST a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Ross Stores, Inc. on LongYield’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on ROST. Ross Stores, Inc.’s share was trading at $231.73 as of May 29th. ROST’s trailing and forward P/E were 32.36 and 30.96 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]
